title: Integrated Render Pipeline: ACES + Sharpen + Glints + Layer Fix in CubeVisualization.tsx

requirements.text: In CubeVisualization.tsx, configure the global renderer inside onCreated: set gl.toneMapping = THREE.NoToneMapping, gl.autoClear = false, gl.setClearColor(0x000000, 1.0), gl.setClearAlpha(1.0). Do NOT change gl.outputColorSpace and do NOT set gl.toneMappingExposure.
acceptanceCriteria: gl.toneMapping is THREE.NoToneMapping after canvas creation
gl.autoClear is false
Clear color is #000000 with alpha 1.0
outputColorSpace remains at default SRGBColorSpace
No toneMappingExposure assignment present

requirements.text: In CubeVisualization.tsx, configure the UnrealBloomPass with intensity: 0.8, radius: 0.65, threshold: 0.1. Add luminanceSmoothing = 0.1 guarded by a feature check: if ('luminanceSmoothing' in bloomPass) { (bloomPass as any).luminanceSmoothing = 0.1; }
acceptanceCriteria: Bloom pass has intensity 0.8, radius 0.65, threshold 0.1
luminanceSmoothing is set only when the property exists on the pass

requirements.text: In CubeVisualization.tsx, set bloomComposer.renderToScreen = false and finalComposer.renderToScreen = true. Initialize bloomTexture as new THREE.Texture() to prevent startup crashes before the first bloom render.
acceptanceCriteria: bloomComposer.renderToScreen is false
finalComposer.renderToScreen is true
bloomTexture ref is initialized to new THREE.Texture() before first frame

requirements.text: In CubeVisualization.tsx, replace the composite shader fragment with the full ACES + sharpening + glints implementation: use NaN-safe texel calculation (vec2 texel = 1.0 / max(resolution, vec2(1.0))), sharpen strength 0.15, glint threshold 2.5 and strength 3.0, toneMapACES function, and output gl_FragColor = vec4(mapped, 1.0). Remove HueSaturationPass from the EffectComposer chain. CompositePass must be the final pass in finalComposer.
acceptanceCriteria: Fragment shader uses NaN-safe resolution division via max(resolution, vec2(1.0))
Sharpening kernel with strength 0.15 is applied
Glint highlight is computed with threshold 2.5 and strength 3.0
ACES tonemapping is applied before final output
Final gl_FragColor alpha is 1.0
HueSaturationPass is not present in either composer chain
CompositePass is the last pass in finalComposer

requirements.text: In CubeVisualization.tsx, implement a robust render loop in useFrame: guard all rendering inside if (sz.width > 0 && sz.height > 0). Inside: (1) renderer.clear(true, true, true), (2) set camera.layers.set(1) then run bloomComposerRef.current.render(), (3) set camera.layers.set(0) then camera.layers.enable(1), (4) update compositePass resolution uniform using sz.width * viewport.dpr and sz.height * viewport.dpr, (5) assign mat.uniforms.bloomTexture.value = bloomComposerRef.current.readBuffer.texture, (6) run finalComposerRef.current.render().
acceptanceCriteria: No rendering occurs when canvas dimensions are zero
Bloom pass renders only layer 1 objects
Final pass renders both layer 0 and layer 1 objects
Resolution uniform is set per frame in pixel units accounting for DPR
bloomTexture uniform uses readBuffer.texture for stability

requirements.text: In CubeVisualization.tsx, configure the BackgroundSphere mesh with layers={0} and renderOrder={-1000}. In its fragment shader replace any bare resolution division with: vec2 p = (gl_FragCoord.xy * 2.0 - resolution.xy) / min(max(resolution.x, 1.0), max(resolution.y, 1.0)); to prevent NaN artifacts.
acceptanceCriteria: BackgroundSphere is on layer 0 and renders before other scene objects (renderOrder -1000)
Fragment shader uses NaN-safe resolution normalization
Background sphere is visible on scene load without black screen artifacts

requirements.text: In CubeVisualization.tsx, change the Suspense fallback from null to <color attach="background" args={["#000000"]} /> so the canvas shows a black background during asset loading instead of transparency.

quotes: Change <Suspense fallback={null}> to: <Suspense fallback={<color attach="background" args={["#000000"]} />}>

acceptanceCriteria: Canvas background is opaque black during the Suspense loading phase
No transparent flash appears before 3D content loads

constraints: Only modify frontend/src/components/CubeVisualization.tsx — do not touch LandModel.tsx, biome settings, or material files
No direct renderer.render() calls are allowed; all rendering must go through EffectComposer instances
Do not change gl.outputColorSpace from its default SRGBColorSpace
nonGoals: Changes to LandModel.tsx or any biome/material configuration
Changes to bloom or post-processing configuration in any file other than CubeVisualization.tsx
